commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Windows-only CLI respawn plan that prepends `--stack-size=8192` unless a stack-size exec arg is already present, with focused unit tests for that planner.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +24. Total +42 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main and v2026.5.22 still bypass Windows respawn, while the linked issue gives concrete Windows install/run steps, crash signatures, and a second affected-user confirmation. I did not run native Windows package proof in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(cli): add Windows stack-size respawn
target.body:
## Summary
- add a Windows-only respawn path that launches the CLI with `--stack-size=8192`
- preserve existing Windows behavior for CA cert and warning-suppression respawns
- skip the respawn when the user already provided a `--stack-size` exec arg

Fixes #62055.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/entry.respawn.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/entry.respawn.ts src/entry.respawn.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/entry.respawn.ts src/entry.respawn.test.ts`
target.author: giodl73-repo
